ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the vehicle model */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the vehicle model */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the vehicle belongs to */,
  "enginebrake" INTEGER /* Engine brake performance metric */,
  "iwheelf" INTEGER /* Front wheel performance metric */,
  "iwheelt" INTEGER /* Rear wheel performance metric */,
  "ipropf" INTEGER /* Front propeller performance metric */,
  "ipropR" INTEGER /* Rear propeller performance metric */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production of the model started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production of the model ended */,
  "average_mileage" INTEGER /* Average mileage of the vehicle model */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard the vehicle meets */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "maximum_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration_0_60" INTEGER /* Time it takes for the vehicle to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine performance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the performance record belongs to */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine */,
  "fuel_consumption" INTEGER /* Fuel consumption of the engine */,
  "emissions" TEXT /* Emissions of the engine */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" INTEGER /* Displacement of the engine in cubic centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wheel_performance" (
  "wheel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wheel performance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the performance record belongs to */,
  "wheel_type" TEXT /* Type of wheel (e.g., alloy, steel) */,
  "diameter" INTEGER /* Diameter of the wheel */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the wheel */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the wheel */,
  "tire_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the tires */,
  "tire_model" TEXT /* Model of the tires */,
  "tire_pressure" INTEGER /* Recommended tire pressure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wheel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wheel_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "propeller_performance" (
  "propeller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each propeller performance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the performance record belongs to */,
  "propeller_type" TEXT /* Type of propeller (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "pitch" INTEGER /* Pitch of the propeller */,
  "diameter" INTEGER /* Diameter of the propeller */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the propeller */,
  "blades" INTEGER /* Number of blades on the propeller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("propeller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_propeller_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the team was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., lead, member) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle version */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the vehicle version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or descriptions about the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_versions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle update */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the update belongs to */,
  "update_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the vehicle update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes or descriptions about the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the update was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_updates_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_updates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
